scripts.build:cn: npm run build && node scripts/generate-robots.js cn && node scripts/generate-sitemap.js cn
scripts.build:intl: npm run build && node scripts/generate-robots.js intl && node scripts/generate-sitemap.js intl
scripts.generate-seo: node scripts/generate-robots.js cn && node scripts/generate-sitemap.js cn
scripts.generate-seo:intl: node scripts/generate-robots.js intl && node scripts/generate-sitemap.js intl
scripts.preview: npm run build && wrangler pages dev ./dist
scripts.deploy: npm run build:intl && wrangler pages deploy ./dist
